# fcs_harbor_robot_account (Resource)

A tenant project-scoped Harbor Robot Account. Permission profiles are fixed to pull or push_pull. The secret is returned only after create or rotation and is stored as sensitive Terraform state; protect the state backend accordingly.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Tenant-local Robot Account name. Changing it creates a new account.
- `permission_profile` (String) Fixed least-privilege profile: pull or push_pull.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Human-readable purpose of the account.
- `disabled` (Boolean) Disable the account without deleting it.
- `expires_in_days` (Number) Credential lifetime in days (1–365).
- `rotation_trigger` (String) Arbitrary version marker. Changing this value rotates the secret in place. The marker is provider-local and is never sent to Harbor.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) Creation timestamp.
- `expires_at` (String) Server-reported expiry timestamp.
- `id` (String) FCS registry resource ID (UUID).
- `project` (String) Tenant Harbor project derived by the API, e.g. t-8012.
- `registry` (String) Registry hostname.
- `secret` (String, Sensitive) One-time Robot Account secret. Null after import until rotation_trigger changes.
- `status` (String) FCS lifecycle status.
- `updated_at` (String) Last update timestamp.
- `username` (String) Full Harbor Robot Account username.
